_comment: Starter config. Copy to config.json and customize (cp config.example.json config.json). If config.json is absent, the built-in default in lib.py is used, so the tool still runs. Edit categories visually with `python3 config_editor.py`.

categories.name: AI
categories.desc: LLMs, prompting, agents, AI/ML concepts, model news

categories.name: PM
categories.desc: product-management craft, frameworks, interviews, planning, metrics, discovery

categories.name: DESIGN
categories.desc: UX/UI, design systems, Figma, usability, visual/interaction design

categories.name: MINDSET
categories.desc: psychology, philosophy, self-development, money/time/discipline, quotes, life frameworks

categories.name: CAREER
categories.desc: job search, resume, hiring, networking, interviews, work-craft, leadership/management

categories.name: EVENTS
categories.desc: webinars, conferences, panels, RSVPs, meetups, dated happenings

categories.name: READING
categories.desc: book titles, reading lists, book covers, "to read"

categories.name: PLACES
categories.desc: travel, restaurants, maps, venue/location info worth keeping

categories.name: PROTECT
categories.desc: sensitive identity/financial docs (passport, visa, IDs, payment, account #) — NEVER delete

categories.name: REVIEW
categories.desc: genuinely can't tell; needs human eyes

categories.name: DELETE
categories.desc: junk with no durable reusable content
